pageContext.name: Witch-King of Angmar
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Witch-King of Angmar! From The Lord of the Rings, the Witch-King of Angmar1:10 Art Scale Statue is hand-painted.  Don't miss your chance to add this limited edition statue to your Lord of the Rings collection!
